sentence_reviews.text: Model-predictive control repeatedly optimizes a finite-horizon action sequence under a dynamics model, executes the first action, and replans from new observations.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA sequential decision/control background and Dreamer world-model control context; MPC-specific definition is synthesized.
sentence_reviews.notes: The definition is standard for MPC, but the packet lacks a dedicated MPC reference.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Model-predictive control is to connect Dynamical systems & control theory, Optimization theory to downstream capabilities including Robotics & embodied AI.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Sequential decision/control and model-based RL/control evidence; robotics role is synthesized.
sentence_reviews.notes: Control and optimization links are supported; the robotics downstream framing is not directly stated in the packet.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA control/agents and Dreamer embodied-control benchmark context.
sentence_reviews.notes: MPC is a plausible robotics substrate, but the packet evidence is indirect.

sentence_reviews.text: combined with Dynamical systems & control theory
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA control and sequential decision-making material.
sentence_reviews.notes: MPC directly relies on dynamics/control concepts.

sentence_reviews.text: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Dynamical systems & control theory, Optimization theory.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Planning/control optimization cost and model-based rollout background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Repeated planning/optimization cost is supported; confident-error/verifier wording is broader than cited evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: Model-predictive control uses Dynamical systems & control theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.notes: A dynamics model and control objective are central to MPC.

sentence_reviews.text: Model-predictive control uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.notes: Finite-horizon action optimization is central to MPC.

sentence_reviews.text: Model-predictive control uses Latent world models & predictive dynamics as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Dreamer learned world-model control and AIMA dynamics/planning background.
sentence_reviews.notes: MPC requires a predictive dynamics model, but not necessarily a latent learned world model.

edge_reviews.notes: Dynamics and control are core to MPC.
MPC directly optimizes finite-horizon action sequences.
A predictive model is common/necessary, but a latent world-model dependency is narrower than MPC generally.
